metadata.name: JLCPCB 2-layer (standard)
metadata.process_notes: Standard-process defaults for JLCPCB's economy 2-layer flow (process tier: standard/economy, 1oz outer copper, 1.6 mm FR-4). Numbers are published standard-process values (min trace/space 6 mil / 0.152 mm, min via drill 0.15 mm, min mechanical/PTH drill 0.20 mm, min annular ring 0.13 mm, through-hole aspect ratio 8:1) and MUST be confirmed against JLCPCB's current capabilities datasheet before relied upon. high_speed_si checks are disabled because the economy 2-layer flow does not offer a controlled-impedance / stackup service.
